findings.title: validateHermesGateOptionalFields tenantContext parameter is unused
findings.summary: Claude noted validateHermesGateOptionalFields accepts tenantContext but tenant scope enforcement happens in validateHermesGateReferenceRelationships. This is functionally correct and non-blocking.

findings.title: Optional relationship refs are validated twice
findings.summary: Claude noted blocked_claim_refs and human_approval_refs are checked by both optional-field and relationship-reference validation when validateHermesGate runs. This is harmless defense-in-depth.

findings.title: Production-ready procedural artifacts still pending before promotion
findings.summary: Claude noted the subphase correctly remained implemented before this review, adjudication, construction inspection, status promotion, and final validation rerun.

raw_result_excerpt: overall_verdict: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS; all findings are P3 notes; nothing blocks subphase closeout; no P0/P1/P2 findings.
